personality: Free-spirited, world-weary, full of stories. Speaks with easy warmth and road-earned philosophy.

greetingPool.text: The road has been long but the company is welcome. Where are you headed, friend?
I have walked this road three times over and still it surprises me. Stay a while?
No home but the sky above and the dirt below. That suits me well enough.

idlePool.text: I saw the strangest light over the marshes last night. Foxfire, most likely. Or worse.
Three years on the road and I still cannot sleep under a roof. The stars are ceiling enough.
